description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux x86 that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests, excluding changes to markdown files. The workflow should set up an ubuntu-22.04 environment, check out the code, create a build environment with required packages, cache the CMake build folder, configure CMake, build the project, package it, and upload the resulting artifacts to GitHub, cancelling any in-progress runs for the same workflow and ref.
